expectations.evidence: The body is authored directly in Confluence storage format XHTML, not markdown. 'Used Confluence storage format XHTML, not Markdown' and 'The skill does not convert Markdown to Confluence storage format -- the body must be constructed as valid XHTML with Confluence-specific macros.'

expectations.evidence: The body contains '<ac:structured-macro ac:name="code">' with proper CDATA wrapping.

expectations.text: Ordered lists are converted to <ol><li> HTML

expectations.text: marked library handles the conversion (toStorageFormat uses marked, not custom parser)
